---
title: "About Me"
page-layout: article
---

## Who I Am

I'm a dual-degree business student wrapping up five years split between 
**Brock University** in St. Catharines, Ontario, Canada and **Dublin City University** 
in Dublin, Ireland. The degree is unusual by design. I completed three years in Canada and two years in Ireland, with internships in both countries. It has shaped how I think about problems, people, and places more than any single course has.

My academic focus sits at the intersection of business and data: how you collect 
it, make sense of it, and turn it into decisions that actually matter. Outside the 
classroom, I'm a photogrophare and traveller with a passion for learning about new cultures.
I believe that the best way to understand something is to go and see it yourself. [^1]

[^1]: The photography page on this site is a small record of that: a collection of  
my favourite photos from home and my travels abroad.

---

## My Journey

```{mermaid}
timeline
    title Academic & Professional Journey
    2021 : Started BBA at Brock University
         : St. Catharines, Ontario, Canada
    2022 : First internship experience
         : Developed a passion for the automotive industry and operations 
    2024 : Transferred to DCU for Global Business
         : Dublin, Ireland
    2025 : Second internship experience
         : Developed Excel and Power BI skills
         : Found my passion for data analytics
    2025/2026 : Final Year of College 
         : FreshTRACK Startup — New Enterprise Development 
         : Machine Learning research paper
         : Undergraduate Dissertation
         : ePortfolio and graduation
```

---

## Skills

| Area | Tools & Technologies |
|------|----------------------|
| Data Analysis | Python, Pandas, Excel, Power BI |
| Machine Learning | Scikit-learn, classification models, model evaluation |
| Web & Workflow | Quarto, Git, GitHub Pages, SCSS |
| Visualisation | Plotly, Matplotlib, Seaborn |
| Business | Strategy, marketing, operations, sales |

---

## Education

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
### 🎓 Dublin City University — Global Business
**BA Global Business** · 2024–2026 · Dublin, Ireland  
Modules include Machine Learning and Advanced Python, New Enterprise Development, 
Business Strategy, Innovation Economics, Workflow & Data Management, and Business Ethics.
:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
### 🎓 Brock University — Business Administration
**BBA (Hons) Business Administration** · 2021–2026 · St. Catharines, Ontario, Canada  
Goodman School of Business. Focus on operations, data analytics, 
and strategic management.
:::

---

## Interests

Beyond the academic work, a few things keep me grounded:

- 📷 **Photography** – I shoot wherever I travel, mostly landscapes and street. 
You can see some of it on the [Photography](/photography.html) page.
- 🍳 **Cooking** – feeding people is one of my favourite things to do.
- ✈️ **Travel** – the dual-degree provided me with numerous opportunities for spontaneous travel, fuelling my passion. 

---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Currently Open To
Graduate roles and opportunities in **data analytics**, **business intelligence**, 
or **operations** – particularly where analytical thinking meets real business impact.
:::
